title: campylotropis yunnanensis subsp. yunnanensis
intro: Campylotropis yunnanensis subsp. yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan Campylotropis or Yunnan Mountain Pea, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan, China, and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Campylotropis yunnanensis subsp. yunnanensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
